attempts.strategy: Package Mathlib tildeFinsupp iso into project IsFreeMod predicate
attempts.code_tried: theorem tilde_free {R : CommRingCat.{u}} (Λ : Type u) [Finite Λ] : IsFreeMod (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde (ModuleCat.of ↑R (Λ →₀ ↑R))) := ⟨Λ, ⟨AlgebraicGeometry.tildeFinsupp Λ⟩⟩
attempts.insight: tildeFinsupp ι : tilde (ι →₀ R) ≅ SheafOfModules.free ι exists directly; [Finite Λ] kept only to match blueprint, not needed by IsFreeMod. Axiom-clean.

next_steps: Done. Needs sync \leanok on lem:tilde_free (sync added it, iter=12 added=1).

attempts.strategy: Use Mathlib counit-iso-from-global-presentation lemma, wrap counit as iso
attempts.code_tried: noncomputable def tilde_of_presentation {R : CommRingCat.{u}} (M : (Spec R).Modules) (P : M.Presentation) : AlgebraicGeometry.tilde ((modulesSpecToSheaf.obj M).presheaf.obj (.op ⊤)) ≅ M := haveI := isIso_fromTildeΓ_of_presentation M P; asIso M.fromTildeΓ
attempts.insight: Essential-surjectivity half of affine equivalence, CONDITIONAL on a global M.Presentation. Mathlib supplies the counit-iso brick the plan feared was absent. New lean_aux node — needs blueprint block (unmatched=1).

next_steps: Planner must author a blueprint block (e.g. lem:tilde_counit_of_pres) and wire into lem:fp_sheaf_affine_tilde \uses.

General sheaf stalkFunctor mono-detection exists but is not wired to SheafOfModules/tilde.
